content.question: The actual demand for local schools among parents and students in depopulating villages—as distinct from stated preference or nostalgia—is unknown; it is unclear whether parents would actively choose to send children to a retained local school if given a choice between a small local school and a larger, further-away district school with more resources.
content.reduction_path: A choice-experiment or discrete-choice survey of parents in affected villages, offering realistic trade-offs (e.g., school size, commute time, resource investment, likelihood of long-term viability) and measuring their actual willingness to commit to a local school option.
